about.title: About Me
about.headline: Based in Cairo,
about.bio: I'm a video editor and motion designer with 3+ years of experience turning brand ideas into cinematic stories. I've worked with real estate developers, food brands, tech startups, and tourism boards across Egypt and Saudi Arabia. My work lives at the intersection of storytelling, strategy, and visual craft — every frame is intentional.
